name: Western Union Money Order Only
description_short: Western Union is a global money transfer service enabling customers to send and receive funds internationally and domestically with competitive exchange rates and low fees.
description_long:
Western Union is an established financial services company that specializes in cross-border and domestic money transfers. The company operates a worldwide network allowing customers to send money from the United States to over 200 countries and territories, making it one of the most widely accessible remittance platforms globally.

Western Union's primary offerings include online money transfer services with transparent fee structures ranging from $1.99 to $0.00 USD depending on the transfer type and promotion. The platform supports transfers in multiple currencies including MXN, GTQ, PHP, INR, COP, DOP, JMD, AFN, EUR, and many others across recipient countries. Customers can register online to access promotional rates, including $0 fees on first international transfers and improved exchange rates compared to standard pricing.

The company distinguishes itself through its extensive global reach, supporting transfers to virtually every country and territory worldwide. The website demonstrates real-time exchange rate transparency (example: 1 USD = 16.9723-17.6573 MXN) and allows customers to see exact amounts receivers will obtain before completing transactions. The platform emphasizes both speed and cost-efficiency, with promotional incentives for new registered users.

However, the website content is limited to online transfer functionality and does not provide comprehensive information about all service offerings, fee structures for different transfer methods, delivery timeframes, or customer service details. The Orange Wallet feature appears temporarily unavailable, indicating potential service reliability concerns. While Western Union is reputable for international remittances, consumers should verify current fees and delivery options directly, as the website excerpt focuses primarily on the promotional transfer scenario.
address: 2802 E Fountain Blvd, Colorado Springs, CO 80910

company_info.headquarters: 2802 E Fountain Blvd, Colorado Springs, CO 80910

pros: Supports transfers to 200+ countries and territories with extensive currency options
Promotional $0 fee on first online international transfer for new registered users
Real-time exchange rate transparency showing sender savings and exact recipient amounts
Online registration available for better exchange rates and reduced fees
Competitive fee structure starting as low as $0 USD on promotional transfers
Multiple currency support including major global currencies (MXN, PHP, INR, COP, EUR, etc.)
Large established network making Western Union widely recognized and accessible
cons: Website indicates Orange Wallet payment method is temporarily unavailable, suggesting service interruptions
Limited information provided about non-online transfer methods (in-person, phone-based options)
No stated delivery timeframes or speed guarantees visible on website excerpt
Standard fees still apply for non-promotional transfers (up to $1.99+ USD depending on service)
Lack of transparent information about all fees and transfer method options on displayed website content
best_for: International remittance senders needing to support family or businesses overseas
Customers transferring funds to Mexico, Philippines, Guatemala, India, Colombia, and other major corridors
New customers eligible for promotional $0-fee first transfers to build account
Users seeking transparent exchange rates and cost visibility before completing transfers
diagnosis: Western Union is best for customers needing to send money internationally or domestically with access to a massive global network and transparent exchange rates. The primary caveat is that the website content is limited and some features (Orange Wallet) show availability issues; consumers should verify current fees, delivery times, and all available payment methods directly with Western Union before sending funds.
services: Domestic money transfers within United States
Multi-currency transfers (USD, MXN, GTQ, PHP, INR, COP, DOP, JMD, AFN, EUR, and 190+ currencies)
Online account registration for promotional rates
Improved exchange rates for registered users
Transfer amount customization with instant receiver amount calculation
Payment via multiple methods (including temporarily unavailable Orange Wallet)
Global recipient location support (200+ countries and territories)
Fee comparison tools and savings calculators
